title: BUG #17848: Deadlock when running ANALYZE on a table while REINDEX INDEX CONCURRENTLY is running
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE demo(val BIGINT, name TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO demo(val, name) SELECT val, 'Name ' || val FROM range(1, 10000000);
key_bug_features: ANALYZE running during REINDEX INDEX CONCURRENTLY
